author: mysticryuujin
content:
Meeting was short but TL;DR: we want to get these merged:
- https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/803
- https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/801

Close this:
- https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/787

And we need <@194432762315407360>'s help or maybe <@543900561460822016> to upgrade the hive chain tests to Osaka
Hack PR: https://github.com/ethereum/hive/pull/1567

In theory we could cut a v1.0.0 release of the repo ( <@504282618372554752> ), but go-ethereum won't pass unless we upgrade the chain:
https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/846
